home.title: Live together, grow forever
home.heroSubtitle1: More than a place to live.
home.heroDescription: Kali is a coliving experience where design meets community, creating experiences that stay with you.
home.card1Description: Live with like-minded people who choose to step out of their comfort zone.
home.card2Description: Homes that are functional, warm, and ready so you can focus on living.
home.card3Description: Dinners, conversations, working together, unexpected laughs.
home.card4Description: Every connection adds something new to your journey.
home.videoDescription: Kali is built to turn everyday living into experiences that stay with you. Because where you live, and who you live with, shapes who you become.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Find your next home in a few steps.
home.step1Description: Tell us about you and what you're looking for.
home.step2Description: We'll contact you and have a conversation to get to know each other.
home.step3Description: We make sure Kali is the right fit, for you and for the community.
home.step4Description: Arrive with everything ready. Start living the experience.
home.forYou1: You want to meet new people and feel like a local from day one.
home.forYou2: You like stepping out of your comfort zone and saying yes to new plans
home.forYou3: You want a home where someone's always up for coffee, afterwork drinks, or dinner.
home.forYou4: You want to move in without the stress — furniture, Wi-Fi, everything sorted.
home.forYou5: You want more than a room — you want community and real connections.
home.forYou6: You want to grow around people who inspire you and push you further.

rooms.rentDescription: Rent covers your private room, shared spaces, utilities, WiFi, weekly cleaning, and be part of the community.
rooms.descriptionDouble: Double bed. Fully furnished room. Move-in ready.
rooms.descriptionSingle: Single bed. Fully furnished room. Move-in ready.

landlords.title: Landlords
landlords.heroTitle: Unlock the full potential of your property
landlords.heroSubtitle: Guaranteed rental income. We handle everything else.
landlords.managedTitle: Your property, fully managed from day one.
landlords.managedDescription: We handpick tenants, handle payments and resolve any issues — so you never have to worry about a thing.
landlords.howItWorksSubtitle: A clear, simple and hassle-free process.
landlords.step1Description: Tell us about your property so we can understand if it meets our requirements.
landlords.step2Description: We analyse its potential: location, layout and overall condition.
landlords.step3Description: We present you with a tailored proposal: how much you can earn and what our management covers.
landlords.step4Description: You collect every month. We manage the property and handle everything else.
landlords.carousel1Text: Rent is always paid between the 1st and 5th of every month. No exceptions.
landlords.carousel2Text: No dependency on cancellations, tenant turnover or low seasons. Your rent is fixed and fully predictable.
landlords.carousel3Text: We work with 7 to 10 year agreements, so you have peace of mind and always know exactly what to expect.
landlords.carousel4Text: When needed, we redesign spaces while preserving the character of your property. We renovate and furnish every detail with care.
landlords.carousel5Text: We take care of everything: cleaning coordination, routine maintenance and repairs whenever something needs fixing.
landlords.carousel6Text: Every resident goes through a thorough screening process. We look for professional, responsible profiles.
landlords.carousel7Text: We are available every day, at any hour, for emergencies or unexpected situations. There is always someone ready to respond.
landlords.carousel8Title: We treat your property like our own
landlords.carousel8Text: We monitor the condition of your property on a regular basis and act fast whenever an issue arises.
landlords.formSuccessMessage: We've received your message. We'll get back to you soon.
landlords.formError: Something went wrong while sending the form. Please try again.

reviews.quote1: Whenever I have a question, they reply within minutes. That kind of responsiveness gives real peace of mind.
reviews.quote2: They completely transformed my apartment. The interior design is beautiful and the property feels more valuable than ever.
reviews.quote3: I haven't had to think about my apartment in months. Everything runs smoothly and the money arrives every month.
reviews.quote4: With Kali I always know when I'll be paid, the same day every month. There are no delays.
reviews.quote5: The Kali team is reliable and trustworthy. I highly recommend them.
reviews.quote6: Working with Kali has completely changed my experience as a landlord.

community.title: Community
community.galleryDescription: At Kali, you live alongside people from different places, backgrounds, and perspectives. That mix is what makes every day feel new.

applyPopup.title: Apply to Kali
applyPopup.successMessage1: Thank you for sharing a bit about yourself.
applyPopup.successMessage2: We'll be in touch soon to continue the conversation.
applyPopup.submitError: Something went wrong while sending your application. Please try again.
applyPopup.requiredError: Please fill in all required fields.
applyPopup.labelMoveDate: When are you looking to move?
applyPopup.labelDuration: For how long are you planning to stay?
applyPopup.placeholderAbout: Who are you? What brings you here? What are you looking for in a living situation?
applyPopup.labelBring: What will you bring to Kali?
applyPopup.labelOffer: What do you expect from Kali?
applyPopup.labelAnything: Anything else you'd like to share?
applyPopup.placeholderAnything: Optional: Any other thoughts, questions, or things you want us to know.

cookieBanner.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyse site usage.
